subcodes.first_line: In the midst of sorrows moveth the Pen of the Most Merciful, making mention of the people of the contingent world, that perchance they may abandon whatsoever they possess [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی بحبوحه الاحزان یتحرک قلم الرحمن و یذکر اهل الامکان لعل یدعون ما عندهم و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
